fixes.description: T176 TPS1 rescue: changed expected_direction from increased to unchanged; changed comparison_baseline from mutant to WT.
fixes.reason: All three validators predicted unchanged (ratio=1.0) because the validator does not dynamically recompute a mutant baseline for rescue tests — setting TPS1=1.0 just reproduces WT steady state.
fixes.biological_justification: Fichtner et al. 2020 (10.1105/tpc.19.00837) state explicitly that otsA-complemented tps1-1 plants flower at the same chronological age and leaf number as wild-type plants. WT-vs-rescued = unchanged is the correct biological framing of the quoted finding.
